item.title: Agile AL-3200 MCC LEFTY Les Paul electric guitar - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: This is a neck-through silverburst left handed Les Paul model from Agile with upgraded higher output Giovanni GCH2 pickups and Switchcraft pickup selector. I will also include a roller bridge with brass saddles from Agile. Not interested in trades at this time.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: Exc! SX Custom VTG Lefty Left Handed Tele Electric Guitar w Case - $200 (Danvers)
item.description: This lefty guitar is in excellent shape. No scratches or dings. It plays nice, with low action. Electronics are good. I put new 10 gauge strings on it and did a set up . The neck is straight and the frets are excellent. This guitar was hardly played. It has low miles. It has a beautiful red wine burst. These SX Guitars are no longer made. They were imported from the mid 90's until around 2010. They have gone up in value on Ebay and Reverb,.. and often sell between $200 and $300 there. The Vintage Series were their most highly regarded products. They did a nice job re creating the classic Fender Strats and Teles. The TEAM Internation Company from Taiwan produce SX guitars at the Starsun Music factory in Guangzhou, China. According to Harmony-Central reviews, SX guitars are as good as American-made Fenders. I wouldn't go that far,... but they certainly blow away the Chinese Fender Squier Tele guitars. Their affordable prices make them ideal for beginners as well as for those who desire an

item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,800 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Lefty Jamstick midi guitar left-handed - $750 (Winthrop)
item.description: Used on one of my projects, don't need it anymore. This system is amazing. I did own every midi guitar out there,(GK Roland etc) this is the best tracking ever. Very easy to operate, no bulky boxes, sounds can be stored in your app, and you can control it through the app on your phone, tablet, computer, or even via Bluetooth. The actual guitar is a very good Strat, with a SSH configuration and a hexaphonic pickup that sends the midi info via USB, no awkward 13 pin. It gives you all the Stratocaster standard sounds with the nice humbucker at the bridge. Locking tuners, stays in tune pretty well. Cost me $1000 new. All original USB cables, manual and QR code for getting the app included. As it came from the factory. Available for pickup in Winthrop. Or I'll ship at buyers expense. I have the original carton and gig bag, so it will be very safe to ship. Payments Zelle or cash, please. Thanks for looking.

item.title: Johnson Acoustic Guitar -Great Condition (Lefty) - $155
item.description: Looking for a solid acoustic guitar with warm tones and reliable craftsmanship? Selling my Johnson JG-624N, a well-built dreadnought that delivers great sound and playability.

item.title: Guitar LEFTY Gibson hummingbird copy - $200 (Cranston)
item.description: This LEFTY Gibson hummingbird copy guitar was made in Korea in the 90s..Serial number 61-12491.. Great condition asking only 250.00 now 225.00 again now 200.00

item.title: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED GUITAR-SX LP - $150 (CRANSTON/W.WARWICK)
item.description: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED SX LES PAUL STYLE WITH FUNKY TOBACCO ALTERNATE DESIGN.

item.title: SX LEFTY/LEFT HANDED GUITAR FOR SALE - $150
item.description: LEFTY/LEFT HANDED SX LES PAUL COPY WITH ALTERNATE TOBACCO COLOR DESIGN.

item.title: Guitar Parts/Guitar Neck - $75 (Millbury)
item.description: $75 for all the parts.

item.title: Epiphone Sheraton Left handed electric guitar alnico pickups w/case - $700 (Quincy)
item.description: Rare lefty Korea-era Epiphone Sheraton. Upgraded Alnico II GFS pickups. original hard case included. No trades.

item.title: Warrior Custom Built Lefty 4 String Bass - $2,375 (Stratford)
item.description: Price Reduction!!!

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,100 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,100.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: 2017 D'Angelico Deluxe EXL-1 / lefty - trades considered - $1,200 (Huntington)
item.description: 2017 D'Angelico Deluxe EXL-1 / left handed model in Satin Cherry finish. The guitar is in mint condition except for a small hair line crack in the finish on the neck heel (see photo), nothing structural. The case is in near mint condition, clean inside, all latches work. This is a discontinued model and pretty rare as it is left handed. One pickup (Seymour Duncan mini-humbucker), volume and tone controls.

item.title: FENDER LEFTY - $800 (Boston Ma.)
item.description: Mint Condition 6 string Lefty also music and Guitar parts etc. Jimi Hendrix CDs some rare. (Price will vary on your choice.) Some CDs have one to a case others have 2 or 3CDs

item.title: Left handed Great Divide acoustic guitar - $140 (Worcester)
item.description: Up for sale is a good condition. Great divide SSD-N left-handed acoustic guitar. Ideal for a lefty beginner Looking to learn. Overall good condition. New strings. Pick up in Worcester, Holden or Shrewsbury.

item.title: Left handed Ibanez Acoustic Guitar - $200 (Worcester)
item.description: Up for sale is a very good condition Ibanez AW 54 - L acoustic guitar. Ideal for a lefty looking for an intermediate acoustic. He typically retail for right around $300. Pick up in Worcester, Holden or Shrewsbury

item.description: Hard to find!! Will trade for guitar pedals or lefty guitar of an equal

item.title: Ibanez AEG70 Left Handed Acoustic Electric Guitar - $270 (Brooklyn)
item.description: The AEG70L is a left-handed AEG series acoustic/electric guitar model introduced by Ibanez for 2020. This lefty model features a Tiger Burst finish.

item.title: Way Cheap Electric Guitars, Aria, Peavey, SX, Charve - $100 (Oakhurst)
item.description: These guitars are in NJ, by Asbury Park. If you can't drive here, this is not for you.

item.title: Danelectro DC-59 NOS Lefthanded guitar - $395 (Ossipee)
item.description: Danelectro DC-59 NOS reissue, Lefthanded guitar. NOS pickups, adjustable bridge, low use, excellent condition. No case.

item.title: Ovation Guitar 1972 Balladeer - $485 (Ossipee)
item.description: Excellent condition, the top has darkened over time to a beautiful rich natural color, is straight, no dents, warps or splits. This is a solid top, neck is straight and really plays and sounds great. The bowl is also excellent. I have owned this for the last 15years and hasn't

item.title: LEFTY Epiphone SG Standard with hardshell case - $415 (Montpelier)
item.description: It's less than two years old; my son got a new guitar. Clean, plays well. Comes with an Epiphone hardshell case.

item.title: Fender Stratocaster MIM - Sunburst - Lefty - Perfect Condition - $599 (Bergen County)
item.description: This is guitar is in amazing condition. It is barely used, and looks almost completely brand new. It has been stored at room temperature in a protective case.

item.title: Dean Electric-Acoustic Bass with Cutaway Left Handed - $295 (New Milford)
item.description: Dean EABC electric-acoustic bass guitar with cutaway for lefties. Plays great sounds great. Very loud when unplugged. I would rate the condition as near mint. There are 2 slight blemishes, both of which are pictured.

item.title: '82-'84 Hondo Stratocaster for trade (Lancaster)
item.description: Lefty Strung Righty, Plays & Sounds nice. Fresh Strings & Set-up. I have plenty of other guitars so this Ole girl doesn't see as much action as it deserves. Has a comfy neck on the thicker side. Pickups hold their own & sound excellent for what they are. Grover Tuners speak for themselves.

item.title: Vintage 1982-'84 Hondo Fame 760 For Trade (Lancaster)
item.description: Lefty Strung Righty, Plays & Sounds nice. Fresh Strings & Set-up. I have plenty of other guitars so this Ole girl doesn't see as much action as it deserves. Has a comfy neck on the thicker side. Pickups hold their own & sound excellent for what they are. Grover Tuners speak for themselves.

item.title: Left handed acoustic guitar - $140 (Worcester)
item.description: Up for sale is a good condition. Great divide left-handed acoustic guitar. Ideal for a lefty beginner Looking to learn. Overall good condition. New strings. Pick up in Worcester, Holden or Shrewsbury.

item.title: Left-handed Schecter Stiletto Extreme 4 Bass Guitar - $300 (Hazlet)
item.description: For the necessary preamble here: I loathe haggling and will not do it. As such, I have listed this item at a fair and reasonable list price. If you are not willing to pay the list price, do not reach out about the item. I will ignore you.
